tasks.subject: Task 0: Cadence enum (cadence.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Name-valued Cadence enum with .minutes + resolve_cadence.

**Files:** Create src/smoke_sense/cadence.py, tests/test_cadence.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_cadence.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/cadence.py", "tests/test_cadence.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_cadence.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["minutes mapping", "resolve_cadence rule"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Add agg_window column (data.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add required agg_window Int16 column; update producers and fixtures.

**Files:** data.py, providers/aqs.py, providers/purpleair.py, tests/conftest.py, tests/test_fetch_cli.py, tests/test_data.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/data.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/aqs.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/purpleair.py", "tests/conftest.py", "tests/test_fetch_cli.py", "tests/test_data.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["agg_window in COLUMNS + REQUIRED_NON_NULL", "providers emit agg_window", "suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Per-day store (store.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Per-day Parquet layout, finer-wins merge, multi-day split, coverage.

**Files:** Create src/smoke_sense/store.py, tests/test_store.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_store.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/store.py", "tests/test_store.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_store.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["write splits by day", "merge finer-wins", "coverage finest per (date,source)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Cadence-aware providers + chunking
tasks.description:
**Goal:** base cadence interface; aqs records agg; purpleair cadence->average + adaptive chunking + end-day-inclusive.

**Files:** providers/base.py, providers/aqs.py, providers/purpleair.py, tests/test_providers_aqs.py, tests/test_providers_purpleair.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_providers_aqs.py tests/test_providers_purpleair.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/providers/base.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/aqs.py", "src/smoke_sense/providers/purpleair.py", "tests/test_providers_aqs.py", "tests/test_providers_purpleair.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_providers_aqs.py tests/test_providers_purpleair.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["resolve_cadence per provider", "PA maps cadence->average + agg_window", "PA chunks 400 to 1 day"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Orchestration (fetcher.py) + CLI rewrite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Gap-detecting fetcher + thin CLI with --cadence/--refetch writing to per-day store.

**Files:** Create src/smoke_sense/fetcher.py, tests/test_fetcher.py; Modify src/smoke_sense/bin/fetch.py, tests/test_fetch_cli.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_fetcher.py tests/test_fetch_cli.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/fetcher.py", "tests/test_fetcher.py", "src/smoke_sense/bin/fetch.py", "tests/test_fetch_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_fetcher.py tests/test_fetch_cli.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hybrid skip/gap/today", "--refetch full range", "CLI per-day files + --cadence"]}
```
